title: ReasoningLens: Hierarchical Visualization and Diagnostic Auditing for Large Reasoning Models
innovation_summary: ReasoningLens: Hierarchical Visualization and Diagnostic Auditing for Large Reasoning Models: To address this, we present ReasoningLens, an open-source framework designed for the hierarchical visualization and diagnostic auditing of complex reasoning chains.
